recommendations.title: Zaï Zaï Zaï Zaï
recommendations.overview: Imagine a world where the worst behaviour you could ever have is to forget your store's loyalty card in your other trousers...that's what happens to Adrien. This serious misconduct forces him to go into hiding, as both police and media hunt him down.

recommendations.title: Wasabi

recommendations.title: OSS 117: Cairo, Nest of Spies
recommendations.overview: Set in 1955, French secret agent Hubert Bonisseur de La Bath/OSS 117 is sent to Cairo to investigate the disappearance of his best friend and fellow spy Jack Jefferson, only to stumble into a web of international intrigue.

recommendations.title: OSS 117: From Africa with Love
recommendations.overview: 1981. Hubert Bonisseur de la Bath, aka OSS 117, is back. For this new mission – more delicate, more dangerous and more torrid than ever – he is forced to team up with a young new colleague, the promising OSS 1001.
